regions.text: We see the same side at all times because the moon is turning round.
The moon The earth It is going round the earth and it is turning round itself. It keeps the same side to the earth.
We see the same side of the moon at all times. Sometimes we see it like this. One half of the moon is dark. The other half is bright. This is a half moon.
Sometimes we see the moon like this. This part of the moon is dark. This part of it is bright. This is a quarter moon.
